full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identifying paper-specific assumptions of the OSSVR method
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the key assumptions specific to the OSSVR method in the Tu & Lin ICML 2010 paper, beyond general ML assumptions like i.i.d. data?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested several candidate assumptions. I selected three that are traceable to specific paper sections: fixed cost matrix, kernel smoothness of regret, and OVA decomposition sufficiency.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Traced each assumption to specific sections and equations in the paper.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What are the key assumptions specific to the OSSVR method in the Tu & Lin ICML 2010 paper, beyond general ML assumptions like i.i.d. data?
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was the only prompt for this task. It helped me generate candidate assumptions which I then filtered and refined based on my reading of the paper, keeping only those traceable to specific sections.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 1.2.
